name: Privilege Modification followed by Suspicious Activity
notes: This rule detects privilege modification for unauthorized users, followed by suspicious execution of processes.
bb_references: BB:BehaviourDefinition: Abnormal Process Spawned match at least 1 times in 1 hour(s) after any of BB:BehaviourDefinition: Abnormal Right Assigned followed by Privileged Container Creation match with the same Container ID (custom)
BB:BehaviourDefinition: Abnormal Right Assigned followed by Privileged Container Creation
conditions_text: when BB:BehaviourDefinition: Abnormal Process Spawned match at least 1 times in 1 hour(s) after any of BB:BehaviourDefinition: Abnormal Right Assigned followed by Privileged Container Creation match with the same Container ID (custom)
thresholds: when BB:BehaviourDefinition: Abnormal Process Spawned match at least 1 times in 1 hour(s) after any of BB:BehaviourDefinition: Abnormal Right Assigned followed by Privileged Container Creation match with the same Container ID (custom)
TD_list: APPLY Privilege Modification followed by Suspicious Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when BB:BehaviourDefinition: Abnormal Process Spawned match at least 1 times in 1 hour(s) after any of BB:BehaviourDefinition: Abnormal Right Assigned followed by Privileged Container Creation match with the same Container ID (custom)
RED_list: Event name: Privilege Modification followed by Suspicious Activity
Event description: This rule detects privilege modification for unauthorized users, followed by suspicious execution of processes.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Container ID (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
